channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: SUMMER PARKING PERMITS NOW AVAILABLE
item.description: Summer 26’ parking permits are now available. Please visit rpi.aimsparking.com to purchase. Any questions please reach out to parking and transportation
item.author: Community

item.title: EMPAC road closure
item.description: Please note that on 5/11 the road near EMPAC will be closed due to food trucks being parked
item.author: Community

item.title: Celebrating April Staff Promotions!
item.description: Congratulations to our colleagues who were promoted in April! Login to Awardco to see who they are!
item.author: Faculty and Staff

item.title: Blackboard Ultra Course View Preview Video
item.description: The Summer 2026 semester will be using Blackboard Ultra Course View. In preparation, here is a preview video of Blackboard Ultra Course View. You will need to log in with your RPI credentials.
item.author: Faculty and Staff

item.title: Division of Human Resources Professional Development Seminar: “Supervisory Essentials” June 10, 2026
item.description: In this seminar, Managers and Supervisors will learn from each other and our Facilitators about important topics such as the Employee Value Proposition and Employee Experience, the six fundamental Leadership competencies at Rensselaer, and experience a “day in the life” of a Supervisor. In addition, the importance of managing employee performance, providing both rewards and recognition, employment law fundamentals and tools for building team capacity will be explored. For more information…
item.author: Faculty and Staff

item.title: Heliocampus Summer 2026 Syllabus Available - Complete by June 1
item.description:
The HelioCampus syllabus module is now available for faculty to access for the summer. Based on the requirements from the Provost’s office, faculty should have their syllabi published in HelioCampus by June 1, 2026. HelioCampus will publish all syllabi automatically on June 8, 2026.

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
